'''lawana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycetophagid|mycetophagid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycetophagid|mycetophagid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lawana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læwænæth|læwænæth]] || [[word:læwænæj|læwænæj]] || [[word:læwænæsh|læwænæsh]] || [[word:læwænæ|læwænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawawanath|lawawanath]] || [[word:lawawanaj|lawawanaj]] || [[word:lawawanash|lawawanash]] || [[word:lawawana|lawawana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawanath|lawanath]] || [[word:lawanaj|lawanaj]] || [[word:lawanash|lawanash]] || [[word:lawana|lawana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawafnath|lawafnath]] || [[word:lawafnaj|lawafnaj]] || [[word:lawafnash|lawafnash]] || [[word:lawafnaf|lawafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawanatha|lawanatha]] || [[word:lawanaja|lawanaja]] || [[word:lawanasha|lawanasha]] || [[word:lawanaka|lawanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawanath|lawanath]] || [[word:lawanaj|lawanaj]] || [[word:lawanash|lawanash]] || [[word:lawana|lawana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawanathal|lawanathal]] || [[word:lawanajal|lawanajal]] || [[word:lawanashal|lawanashal]] || [[word:lawanakal|lawanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawanathatha|lawanathatha]] || [[word:lawanajaja|lawanajaja]] || [[word:lawanashasha|lawanashasha]] || [[word:lawanaka|lawanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawanathan|lawanathan]] || [[word:lawanajan|lawanajan]] || [[word:lawanashan|lawanashan]] || [[word:lawanakan|lawanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawanathaoro|lawanathaoro]] || [[word:lawanajaoro|lawanajaoro]] || [[word:lawanashaoro|lawanashaoro]] || [[word:lawanakaoro|lawanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
